problems.question: The tallest building in my town (　　) 50 years ago.
problems.ja: 私の町で一番高い建物は50年前に建てられた。
problems.en: The tallest building in my town was built 50 years ago.

problems.question: He (　　) captain of the team by the boys.
problems.ja: 彼は少年たちによってチームのキャプテンに選ばれた。
problems.en: He was chosen captain of the team by the boys.

problems.question: How often are the flowers (　　) during the summer?
problems.ja: その花は夏の間どれくらいの頻度で水をあげればいいですか。
problems.en: How often are the flowers watered during the summer?

problems.question: The presidential election (　　) in two years.
problems.ja: 大統領選挙は２年後に行われる。
problems.en: The presidential election will be held in two years.

problems.question: Fortunately, the hospital's new air-conditioning system (　　) when the first heat wave of the summer arrived.
problems.ja: その夏初めての熱波が襲ったとき，幸運にもその病院の新しい空調システムはすでに設置されていた。
problems.en: Fortunately, the hospital's new air-conditioning system had already been installed when the first heat wave of the summer arrived.

problems.question: It has been hard to concentrate on my studies lately because a road (　　) in front of my house.
problems.ja: 自宅の前で道路が造られているので，このところずっと，勉強に集中しにくい。
problems.en: It has been hard to concentrate on my studies lately because a road is being built in front of my house.

problems.question: On her way home from school, the little girl was (　　) a stranger.
problems.ja: 学校からの帰宅途中，その幼い少女は見知らぬ人に話しかけられた。
problems.en: On her way home from school, the little girl was spoken to by a stranger.

problems.question:
だれも人前で笑いものにされるのは好まない。
(be / fun / in / likes / made / nobody / of / to) public.
problems.rawAnswer: Nobody likes to be made fun of in
problems.ja: だれも人前で笑いものにされるのは好まない。
problems.answer: Nobody likes to be made fun of in
problems.en: Nobody likes to be made fun of in public.
